description: A deliverable checkpoint on a service or contract PO whose acceptance releases the associated payment. For service POs there is no goods receipt, so milestone acceptance replaces the GRN: a two-way match (PO + Invoice) plus milestone acceptance stands in for the three-way match (axiom A8). Build-add: services/contract POs use milestone acceptance instead of GRN.

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Milestone Ref.
fields.validation: configurable pattern; unique; immutable once created
fields.purpose: Stable key that ties the milestone to its PO and to the payment its acceptance releases so the service-delivery checkpoint is traceable from definition to acceptance to release.

fields.name: poId
fields.label: Purchase Order
fields.validation: PO exists and is a service/contract PO (no GRN path); read-only after creation
fields.purpose: Links the milestone to the service PO it belongs to so the two-way-match-plus-acceptance path is selected for that order in place of a three-way match.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.validation: non-empty; the deliverable/scope this milestone covers
fields.purpose: Defines the deliverable the milestone represents so the accepting party knows what to verify and the payment release is tied to a clear scope of work.

fields.name: dueEvent
fields.label: Due Event
fields.validation: the event/date the milestone is expected to complete on (e.g. design sign-off, commissioning, phase completion)
fields.purpose: States the trigger that makes the milestone due so the schedule and the acceptance step are anchored to a delivery event rather than an arbitrary date.

fields.name: amount
fields.label: Milestone Amount
fields.validation: > 0; the value released on acceptance of this milestone
fields.purpose: The payment value tied to this deliverable; the amount released to the supplier once the milestone is accepted, matching the installment for this leg.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; inherited from the PO
fields.purpose: The milestone currency; the base-currency sibling is FX-converted so the release threshold and analytics are normalized (axiom A12).

fields.name: acceptanceStatus
fields.label: Acceptance Status
fields.validation: pending -> accepted (deliverable verified) or rejected (not met, no release); accepted is the gate the two-way match relies on for service POs
fields.purpose: The acceptance gate that stands in for goods receipt on a service PO: only an accepted milestone lets the two-way match clear and the payment release proceed (axiom A8). Rejected blocks the release until the deliverable is met.

fields.name: paymentReleaseOnAcceptance
fields.label: Release Payment on Acceptance
fields.validation: true releases the linked installment when acceptanceStatus becomes accepted
fields.purpose: Controls whether acceptance auto-triggers the linked installment's release so the payment for a deliverable flows the moment it is accepted, without a separate manual trigger.

fields.name: acceptedById
fields.label: Accepted By
fields.validation: the user who accepted/rejected the milestone; SoD applies (not the same actor who approves the resulting payment release)
fields.purpose: Records who verified the deliverable for the audit trail and to preserve segregation between acceptance and payment release.

fields.name: acceptedAt
fields.label: Accepted At
fields.purpose: Timestamps the acceptance decision for the audit trail and to order the milestone-to-release timeline.

fields.name: linkedInstallmentId
fields.label: Linked Installment
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when an installment is the payment released on this milestone's acceptance
fields.purpose: Links the milestone to the installment whose release it gates so acceptance and disbursement are connected and the on-milestone-acceptance due event resolves to the right entry.

invariants: A8 service POs use TWO_WAY match + milestone acceptance in place of THREE_WAY (no GRN)
accepted milestone is the gate for payment release on service POs
A6 SoD: acceptance actor distinct from payment release approver
A13 audit + SSE on every committed change
